message:
fix(ci): add shellcheckrc and fix SC2034 warning

- Create .shellcheckrc to disable SC2015 (intentional A && B || C pattern)
- Add SC2034 disable directive for unused BLUE variable in run_e2e.sh

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# ShellCheck configuration for ACFS
+# https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/wiki/Directive
+
+# SC2015: Note that A && B || C is not if-then-else. C may run when A is true.
+# We use this pattern intentionally for error handling (e.g., cmd || true)
+disable=SC2015

@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@ if [[ -t 2 ]]; then
     RED='\033[0;31m'
     GREEN='\033[0;32m'
     YELLOW='\033[0;33m'
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2034
     BLUE='\033[0;34m'
     CYAN='\033[0;36m'
     GRAY='\033[0;90m'
@@ -40,6 +41,7 @@ else
     RED=''
     GREEN=''
     YELLOW=''
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2034
     BLUE='' # unused but kept for consistency
     CYAN=''
     GRAY=''
